title: SCIP Detect Output
description: Universal project detection schema for scip-* tools. Describes the project topology of a repository.

tool.description: The language or tool family that produced this output (e.g. typescript).

root.description: Path to the workspace root, relative to the repository root. '.' for the repository root itself.

type.description: Workspace manager type: pnpm, npm, yarn, bun, or standalone for a single-project repo.

projects.description: All projects in this workspace, flattened. The workspace root is always the first entry.

path.description: Path relative to the repository root. '.' for the root project itself.

parent.description: Path of the parent project, relative to the repository root. Null for workspace roots.

children.description: Paths of direct child projects, relative to the repository root.

producesArtifacts.description: Whether this project produces publishable artifacts. False only for private workspace roots with no entry points.

buildFiles.description: Build manifest and config files found for this project, relative to the project's path. Always includes package.json; also includes tsconfig.json or jsconfig.json when present.

languages.description: Detected languages of this project's source files. Empty array means no source files were found.

buildTool.description: Build tool or package manager (npm, pnpm, yarn, bun, etc.).

config.description: Build/compiler configuration detected for this project. Null or absent if none found.

dependencies.description: Paths of sibling projects (relative to repository root) that this project depends on.

configFile.description: Path to the config file, relative to this FlatProjectNode's path.

ProjectConfig.description: Tool-specific configuration. Always has configFile; additional properties vary by tool (e.g. allowJs for TypeScript).
